captures.alt: Live ReproForge production case showing a succeeded verified job, the immutable public canary commit, and a machine result stating that all three candidate runs matched while the control did not.
captures.caption: First-party production result for the authorized public ReproForge canary at its immutable failing commit.

sanitization: Public synthetic repository metadata, immutable hashes, and server-issued case/job identifiers only; no identity, credential, provider repository ID, private source, or customer data.
provenance: The capture is a real first-party page from the exact ReproForge production deployment; it is not concept art, generated imagery, or a ChatGPT-host screenshot.
openGate: The production path passed. The anonymous trusted ChatGPT case passed separately, while the authorized public-canary review case remains pending until its own list/start/read/export sequence is exercised through ChatGPT.
